records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Nisa every Friday
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Amirul  Momineen  Ali  Ibne  Abi  Talib  (a.s.)  says,  “One who recites Surah Nisa every Friday would remain safe from the squeeze of the grave.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ عَابِسٍ عَنْ أَبِی مَرْیَمَ عَنِ الْمِنْهَالِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ زِرِّ بْنِ حُبَیْشٍ عَنْ أَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ النِّسَاءِ فِی کُلِّ جُمُعَهٍ أُومِنَ مِنْ ضَغْطَهِ الْقَبْرِ.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ismail b. Mihran from al-Hassan b. Ali from Abi Mas’ud al-Madaini from Abi al-Jarud from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Maidah every Thursday, his faith will never wear the clothes of injustice and he would never commit polytheism.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنْ أَبِی مَسْعُودٍ الْمَدَائِنِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی الْجَارُودِ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْمَائِدَهِ فِی کُلِّ یَوْمِ خَمِیسٍ لَمْ یَلْتَبِسْ إِیمَانُهُ بِظُلْمٍ وَ لَمْ یُشْرِکْ بِهِ أَبَداً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ismail b. Mihran from al-Hassan b. Ali from Abi Mas’ud al-Madaini from Abi al-Jarud from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Maidah every Thursday, his faith will never wear the clothes of injustice and he would never commit polytheism.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Abi al-Qasim from Muhammad b. Ali al-Kufi from Ismail b. Mihran from al-Hassan b. Ali from Ali b. al-Hussain b. Muhammad b. Farqad from al-Hakam b. Dhahir from Abi Salih from Ibn Abbas who said: It is narrated from Ibne Abbas that one who recites Surah Anaam every night would remain safe on the Day of Judgment and would never see the fire of Hell.
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِی الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ الْکُوفِیِّ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ فَرْقَدٍ عَنِ الْحَکَمِ بْنِ ظُهَیْرٍ عَنْ أَبِی صَالِحٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْأَنْعَامِ فِی کُلِّ لَیْلَهٍ کَانَ مِنَ الْآمِنِینَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ لَمْ یَرَ بِعَیْنِهِ النَّارَ أَبَداً-
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Abi al-Qasim from Muhammad b. Ali al-Kufi from Ismail b. Mihran from al-Hassan b. Ali from Ali b. al-Hussain b. Muhammad b. Farqad from al-Hakam b. Dhahir from Abi Salih from Ibn Abbas who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: It is narrated from Ibne Abbas that one who recites Surah Anaam every night would remain safe on the Day of Judgment and would never see the fire of Hell.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 2.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says, “Surah Anaam was revealed whole at once. Seventy thousand angels kept watch on it when  it  was  revealed  on  Muhammad  (s.a.w.s.).  Hence  it should  be  regarded  as  an  honored  Surah  and  must  be respected.  If  people  had  known  what  is  there  in  it  they would have never ignored it.”
records.arabicText: وَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع نَزَلَتْ سُورَهُ الْأَنْعَامِ جُمْلَهً وَاحِدَهً شَیَّعَهَا سَبْعُونَ أَلْفَ مَلَکٍ حَتَّی نَزَلَتْ عَلَی مُحَمَّدٍ ص فَعَظِّمُوهَا وَ بَجِّلُوهَا فَإِنَّ اسْمَ اللَّهِ فِیهَا فِی سَبْعِینَ مَوْضِعاً وَ لَوْ عَلِمَ النَّاسُ مَا فِیهَا مَا تَرَکُوهَا.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan b. Ali from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Araaf once every month would be included among those for whom there is no fear or sorrow on the Day of Judgment. One who recites it every Friday would be included among those for whom there is no accounting on the Day of Judgment. Know that one of the Muhkamat (clear verses) of the Holy Quran is present in this Surah and it will bear witness on the Day of Judgment for the reciter.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْأَعْرَافِ فِی کُلِّ شَهْرٍ کَانَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ مِنَ الَّذِینَ لا خَوْفٌ عَلَیْهِمْ وَ لا هُمْ یَحْزَنُونَ فَإِنْ قَرَأَهَا فِی کُلِّ جُمُعَهٍ کَانَ مِمَّنْ لَا یُحَاسَبُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ أَمَا إِنَّ فِیهَا مُحْکَماً فَلَا تَدَعُوا قِرَاءَتَهَا فَإِنَّهَا تَشْهَدُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ لِمَنْ قَرَأَهَا.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan b. Ali from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Araaf once every month would be included among those for whom there is no fear or sorrow on the Day of Judgment. One who recites it every Friday would be included among those for whom there is no accounting on the Day of Judgment. Know that one of the Muhkamat (clear verses) of the Holy Quran is present in this Surah and it will bear witness on the Day of Judgment for the reciter.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Anfaal and Surah Taubah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Anfaal and Surah Taubah every month would never get involved in hypocrisy and would be among the Shias of Amirul Momineen (a.s.).”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْأَنْفَالِ وَ سُورَهَ بَرَاءَهَ فِی کُلِّ شَهْرٍ لَمْ یَدْخُلْهُ نِفَاقٌ أَبَداً وَ کَانَ مِنْ شِیعَهِ أَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Anfaal and Surah Taubah every month would never get involved in hypocrisy and would be among the Shias of Amirul Momineen (a.s.).”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan b. al-Hussain b. Muhammad b. Farqad from Fadhl [Fudhayl] al-Ghassan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Yunus every two to three months would never have fear that he is ignorant and he would be included among the near ones on the Day of Judgment.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ فَرْقَدٍ عَنْ فضل [فُضَیْلٍ] الْغَسَّانِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ یُونُسَ فِی کُلِّ شَهْرَیْنِ أَوْ ثَلَاثَهٍ لَمْ یُخَفْ عَلَیْهِ أَنْ یَکُونَ مِنَ الْجَاهِلِینَ وَ کَانَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ مِنَ الْمُقَرَّبِینَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan b. al-Hussain b. Muhammad b. Farqad from Fadhl [Fudhayl] al-Ghassan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Yunus every two to three months would never have fear that he is ignorant and he would be included among the near ones on the Day of Judgment.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sandal from Katheer b. Kathira from Farwa b. al-Ajuri from Abi Ja’far Muhammad b. Ali (a.s.) who said: Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.), “One who recites Surah Hud every Friday, the Almighty Lord would gather him along with the group of prophets on the Day of Judgment and he would be considered sinless on that day.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ صَنْدَلٍ عَنْ کَثِیرِ بْنِ کَاثِرَهَ عَنْ فَرْوَهَ بْنِ الْآجُرِّیِّ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ هُودٍ فِی کُلِّ جُمُعَهٍ بَعَثَهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ فِی زُمْرَهِ النَّبِیِّینَ وَ لَمْ یُعْرَفْ لَهُ خَطِیئَهٌ عَمِلَهَا یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sandal from Katheer b. Kathira from Farwa b. al-Ajuri from Abi Ja’far Muhammad b. Ali (a.s.) who said: Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.),
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Hud every Friday, the Almighty Lord would gather him along with the group of prophets on the Day of Judgment and he would be considered sinless on that day.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Yusuf every day or night, the Almighty Allah would resurrect him on the Day of Judgment in a form as handsome as Yusuf (a.s.). He won’t have any fear on the Day of Judgment and he would be among the virtuous servants of Allah. This Surah was revealed in the Old Testament also.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ یُوسُفَ ع فِی کُلِّ یَوْمٍ أَوْ فِی کُلِّ لَیْلَهٍ بَعَثَهُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَی یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ جَمَالُهُ مِثْلُ جَمَالِ یُوسُفَ ع وَ لَا یُصِیبُهُ فَزَعٌ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ کَانَ مِنْ خِیَارِ عِبَادِ اللَّهِ الصَّالِحِینَ وَ قَالَ إِنَّهَا کَانَتْ فِی التَّوْرَاهِ مَکْتُوبَهً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Yusuf every day or night, the Almighty Allah would resurrect him on the Day of Judgment in a form as handsome as Yusuf (a.s.). He won’t have any fear on the Day of Judgment and he would be among the virtuous servants of Allah. This Surah was revealed in the Old Testament also.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) that he said: “One who recites Surah Raad excessively, the Almighty Allah would never let him get struck by lightning even if that person is the enemy of Ahle Bayt (a.s.). If he is a believer He would make him enter Paradise and if he does intercession for his relatives and friends it would be accepted from him.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع أَنَّهُ قَالَ: مَنْ أَکْثَرَ قِرَاءَهَ سُورَهِ الرَّعْدِ لَمْ یُصِبْهُ اللَّهُ بِصَاعِقَهٍ أَبَداً وَ لَوْ کَانَ نَاصِبِیّاً وَ إِذَا کَانَ مُؤْمِناً أُدْخِلَ الْجَنَّهَ بِلَا حِسَابٍ وَ یُشَفَّعُ فِی جَمِیعِ مَنْ یَعْرِفُهُ مِنْ أَهْلِ بَیْتِهِ وَ إِخْوَانِهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) that he said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Raad excessively, the Almighty Allah would never let him get struck by lightning even if that person is the enemy of Ahle Bayt (a.s.). If he is a believer He would make him enter Paradise and if he does intercession for his relatives and friends it would be accepted from him.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Ibrahim and Surah Hijr
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Abi al-Maghraa’ from ’Anbasa b. Mus’ab from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Ibrahim and Surah Hijr in two rakats on Friday would never get involved in poverty, insanity and calamity.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِی الْمَغْرَاءِ عَنْ عَنْبَسَهَ بْنِ مُصْعَبٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ إِبْرَاهِیمَ وَ الْحِجْرِ فِی رَکْعَتَیْنِ جَمِیعاً فِی کُلِّ جُمُعَهٍ لَمْ یُصِبْهُ فَقْرٌ أَبَداً وَ لَا جُنُونٌ وَ لَا بَلْوَی.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Abi al-Maghraa’ from ’Anbasa b. Mus’ab from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Ibrahim and Surah Hijr in two rakats on Friday would never get involved in poverty, insanity and calamity.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from ’Asim al-Khayyat from Muhammad b. Muslim from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Nahl every month would not see harm in the world and would be immune from seventy diseases the least of whom are insanity, leprosy and white spots. And his destination would be Jannat-e-Adn inside Paradise.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ الْخَیَّاطِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ النَّحْلِ فِی کُلِّ شَهْرٍ کُفِیَ الْمَغْرَمَ فِی الدُّنْیَا وَ سَبْعِینَ نَوْعاً مِنْ أَنْوَاعِ الْبَلَایَا أَهْوَنُهُ الْجُنُونُ وَ الْجُذَامُ وَ الْبَرَصُ وَ کَانَ مَسْکَنُهُ فِی جَنَّهِ عَدْنٍ وَ هِیَ وَسَطُ الْجِنَانِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from ’Asim al-Khayyat from Muhammad b. Muslim from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Nahl every month would not see harm in the world and would be immune from seventy diseases the least of whom are insanity, leprosy and white spots. And his destination would be Jannat-e-Adn inside Paradise.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Bani Israel
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Bani Israel every Thursday night won’t die until he meets Qaim (a.t.f.s.) and becomes one of his companions.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَا مِنْ عَبْدٍ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ بَنِی إِسْرَائِیلَ فِی کُلِّ لَیْلَهِ جُمُعَهٍ لَمْ یَمُتْ حَتَّی یُدْرِکَ الْقَائِمَ ع وَ یَکُونَ مِنْ أَصْحَابِهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Bani Israel every Thursday night won’t die until he meets Qaim (a.t.f.s.) and becomes one of his companions.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Amirul Momineen (a.s.) said, “One who recites from Qul innamaa  anaa  basharum  mithlukum  till  the  end  of  this Surah, the Almighty Allah would create a light from his bed till the Holy Kaaba and if that person is from Mecca the light would be created from his bed till Baitul Muqaddas.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی أَبِی عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ هِلَالٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ جَدِّهِ عَنْ أَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع یَقُولُ مَا مِنْ عَبْدٍ یَقْرَأُ قُلْ إِنَّما أَنَا بَشَرٌ مِثْلُکُمْ إِلَی آخِرِ السُّورَهِ إِلَّا کَانَ لَهُ نُوراً مِنْ مَضْجَعِهِ إِلَی بَیْتِ اللَّهِ الْحَرَامِ فَإِنَّ مَنْ کَانَ لَهُ نُورٌ فِی بَیْتِ اللَّهِ الْحَرَامِ کَانَ لَهُ نُورٌ إِلَی بَیْتِ الْمَقْدِسِ.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 2. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ahmad from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ismail b. Mihran who said it was narrated to me by al-Hassan b. Ali from his father from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Kahf every Friday would die the death of a martyr and he would be resurrected along with martyrs and would accompany martyrs on the Day of Judgment.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِیٍّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْکَهْفِ کُلَ لَیْلَهِ جُمُعَهٍ لَمْ یَمُتْ إِلَّا شَهِیداً أَوْ یَبْعَثُهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ الشُّهَدَاءِ وَ وَقَفَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ مَعَ الشُّهَدَاءِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 2. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ahmad from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ismail b. Mihran who said it was narrated to me by al-Hassan b. Ali from his father from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Kahf every Friday would die the death of a martyr and he would be resurrected along with martyrs and would accompany martyrs on the Day of Judgment.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Umar from Aban from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: One who recites Surah Maryam regularly will not die till he is given that which makes him needless in himself, wealth and children; and in the hereafter he would be of the companions of Isa (a.s.) and in the hereafter he would be given a like of the worldly kingdom of Sulaiman bin Dawood (a.s.).
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عُمَرَ عَنْ أَبَانٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَدْمَنَ قِرَاءَهَ سُورَهِ مَرْیَمَ لَمْ یَمُتْ حَتَّی یُصِیبَ مَا یُغْنِیهِ فِی نَفْسِهِ وَ مَالِهِ وَ وُلْدِهِ وَ کَانَ فِی الْآخِرَهِ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ عِیسَی ابْنِ مَرْیَمَ ع وَ أُعْطِیَ فِی الْآخِرَهِ مِثْلَ مُلْکِ سُلَیْمَانَ بْنِ دَاوُدَ ع فِی الدُّنْیَا.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Umar from Aban from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: One who recites Surah Maryam regularly will not die till he is given that which makes him needless in himself, wealth and children; and in the hereafter he would be of the companions of Isa (a.s.) and in the hereafter he would be given a like of the worldly kingdom of Sulaiman bin Dawood (a.s.).

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sabah al-Hadha from Ishaq b. Ammar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Don’t miss the recitation of Surah Taha because Allah loves that Surah and its reciters. If a person recites it regularly, the Almighty Allah would give him scroll of deeds in his right hand on the Day of Judgment. There would be no accounting for his deeds, which he had done after accepting Islam and he would get so many rewards in the hereafter that he would be pleased.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ صَبَّاحٍ الْحَذَّاءِ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: لَا تَدَعُوا قِرَاءَهَ سُورَهِ طه فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ یُحِبُّهَا وَ یُحِبُّ مَنْ قَرَأَهَا وَ مَنْ أَدْمَنَ قِرَاءَتَهَا أَعْطَاهُ اللَّهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ کِتابَهُ بِیَمِینِهِ* وَ لَمْ یُحَاسِبْهُ بِمَا عَمِلَ فِی الْإِسْلَامِ وَ أُعْطِیَ فِی الْآخِرَهِ مِنَ الْأَجْرِ حَتَّی یَرْضَی.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sabah al-Hadha from Ishaq b. Ammar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Don’t miss the recitation of Surah Taha because Allah loves that Surah and its reciters. If a person recites it regularly, the Almighty Allah would give him scroll of deeds in his right hand on the Day of Judgment. There would be no accounting for his deeds, which he had done after accepting Islam and he would get so many rewards in the hereafter that he would be pleased.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Yahya b. Musawir from Fudhayl al-Ghassan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: One who recites Surah Anbiya with sincerity to it, would be among the companions of all the prophets in Paradise. While in the world he would carry much prestige and awe among the people.
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ یَحْیَی بْنِ مُسَاوِرٍ عَنْ فُضَیْلٍ الْغَسَّانِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْأَنْبِیَاءِ حُبّاً لَهَا کَانَ کَمَنْ رَافَقَ النَّبِیِّینَ أَجْمَعِینَ فِی جَنَّاتِ النَّعِیمِ وَ کَانَ مَهِیباً فِی أَعْیُنِ النَّاسِ حَیَاهَ الدُّنْیَا.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Yahya b. Musawir from Fudhayl al-Ghassan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: One who recites Surah Anbiya with sincerity to it, would be among the companions of all the prophets in Paradise. While in the world he would carry much prestige and awe among the people.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1 - In this chain of narration, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Suraqa, from his father, from Abu Abdullah (Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq (as)), he said: "Whoever recites Surah Al-Hajj every three days, his age will not end until he goes to the Sacred House of Allah (Kaaba), and if he dies during his journey, he will enter paradise." I asked, "What if he is unable to do so?" He replied, "Some of the difficulty will be alleviated for him."
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیِّ بْنِ سَوْرَهَ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْحَجِّ فِی کُلِّ ثَلَاثَهِ أَیَّامٍ لَمْ تَخْرُجْ سَنَتُهُ حَتَّی یَخْرُجَ إِلَی بَیْتِ اللَّهِ الْحَرَامِ وَ إِنْ مَاتَ فِی سَفَرِهِ دَخَلَ الْجَنَّهَ قُلْتُ فَإِنْ کَانَ مُخَالِفاً قَالَ یُخَفَّفُ عَنْهُ بَعْضُ مَا هُوَ فِیهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1 - In this chain of narration, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Suraqa, from his father, from Abu Abdullah (Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq (as)), he said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "Whoever recites Surah Al-Hajj every three days, his age will not end until he goes to the Sacred House of Allah (Kaaba), and if he dies during his journey, he will enter paradise." I asked, "What if he is unable to do so?" He replied, "Some of the difficulty will be alleviated for him."

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan b. al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever recites Surah Mominoon, Allah completes for him the greatness of virtues and auspiciousness and if someone recites Surah Mominoon every Friday regularly, his position would be in the high garden of Paradise where he would be with the prophets and messengers.
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ خَتَمَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِالسَّعَادَهِ وَ إِذَا کَانَ مُدْمِنَ قِرَاءَتِهَا فِی کُلِّ جُمُعَهٍ کَانَ مَنْزِلُهُ فِی الْفِرْدَوْسِ الْأَعْلَی مَعَ النَّبِیِّینَ وَ الْمُرْسَلِینَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan b. al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: Whoever recites Surah Mominoon, Allah completes for him the greatness of virtues and auspiciousness and if someone recites Surah Mominoon every Friday regularly, his position would be in the high garden of Paradise where he would be with the prophets and messengers.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Abi Abdillah al-Mu’min from Ibn Muskan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Safeguard your wealth, life and women with recitation of Surah Nur. One who recites it regularly everyday or every night none from his family will fall into trouble till he or she dies. When he dies 70000 angels would accompany his bier upto the grave and all those angels would keep praying for him and seeking forgiveness for him till the reciter is laid down in the grave.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْمُؤْمِنِ عَنِ ابْنِ مُسْکَانَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: حَصِّنُوا أَمْوَالَکُمْ وَ فُرُوجَکُمْ بِتِلَاوَهِ سُورَهِ النُّورِ وَ حَصِّنُوا بِهَا نِسَاءَکُمْ قَالَ مَنْ أَدْمَنَ قِرَاءَتَهَا فِی کُلِّ یَوْمٍ أَوْ فِی کُلِّ لَیْلَهٍ لَمْ یَزْنِ أَحَدٌ مِنْ أَهْلِ بَیْتِهِ أَبَداً حَتَّی یَمُوتَ فَإِذَا هُوَ مَاتَ شَیَّعَهُ إِلَی قَبْرِهِ سَبْعُونَ أَلْفَ مَلَکٍ کُلُّهُمْ یَدْعُونَ وَ یَسْتَغْفِرُونَ اللَّهَ لَهُ حَتَّی یُدْخَلَ فِی قَبْرِهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Abi Abdillah al-Mu’min from Ibn Muskan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Safeguard your wealth, life and women with recitation of Surah Nur. One who recites it regularly everyday or every night none from his family will fall into trouble till he or she dies. When he dies 70000 angels would accompany his bier upto the grave and all those angels would keep praying for him and seeking forgiveness for him till the reciter is laid down in the grave.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sayf b. ’Umayra from Ishaq b. Ammar from Abi al-Hassan (a.s.) who said: “O Ibne Ammar! Do not avoid recitation of Tabaarakalladhee nazzalal furqaana a’laa a’bdihi. One who recites it every night, Allah will never chastise him and not take his account and his abode will be in the high garden of Paradise.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ سَیْفِ بْنِ عَمِیرَهَ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ ع قَالَ: یَا ابْنَ عَمَّارٍ لَا تَدَعْ قِرَاءَهَ سُورَهِ تَبارَکَ الَّذِی نَزَّلَ الْفُرْقانَ عَلی عَبْدِهِ فَإِنَّ مَنْ قَرَأَهَا فِی کُلِّ لَیْلَهٍ لَمْ یُعَذِّبْهُ اللَّهُ أَبَداً وَ لَمْ یُحَاسِبْهُ وَ کَانَ مَنْزِلُهُ فِی الْفِرْدَوْسِ الْأَعْلَی.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sayf b. ’Umayra from Ishaq b. Ammar from Abi al-Hassan (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “O Ibne Ammar! Do not avoid recitation of Tabaarakalladhee nazzalal furqaana a’laa a’bdihi. One who recites it every night, Allah will never chastise him and not take his account and his abode will be in the high garden of Paradise.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Naml, Shuara and Qasas
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Tawaseen (Surah Naml, Shuara and Qasas) every Friday eve would be included among the lovers of Allah. He would remain in the protection of Allah. He would never fall prey to helplessness and would get Paradise much more than he desired. The Almighty Allah would marry him to more than one hundred Hoorul Ein.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الطَّوَاسِینَ الثَّلَاثَهِ فِی لَیْلَهِ الْجُمُعَهِ کَانَ مِنْ أَوْلِیَاءِ اللَّهِ وَ فِی جِوَارِ اللَّهِ وَ کَنَفِهِ وَ لَمْ یُصِبْهُ فِی الدُّنْیَا بُؤْسٌ أَبَداً وَ أُعْطِیَ فِی الْآخِرَهِ مِنَ الْجَنَّهِ حَتَّی یَرْضَی وَ فَوْقَ رِضَاهُ وَ زَوَّجَهُ اللَّهُ مِائَهَ زَوْجَهٍ مِنْ حُورِ الْعِینِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Tawaseen (Surah Naml, Shuara and Qasas) every Friday eve would be included among the lovers of Allah. He would remain in the protection of Allah. He would never fall prey to helplessness and would get Paradise much more than he desired. The Almighty Allah would marry him to more than one hundred Hoorul Ein.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Ankaboot and Room
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “O Aba Muhammad! One who recites Surah Ankaboot and Room on the twenty-third of the month of Ramadan would be included among the people of Paradise. I do not expect anything. Allah would not write any sins of this type. These two Surahs have a high regard near Allah.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْعَنْکَبُوتِ وَ الرُّومِ فِی شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ لَیْلَهَ ثَلَاثَهٍ وَ عِشْرِینَ فَهُوَ وَ اللَّهِ یَا أَبَا مُحَمَّدٍ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّهِ لَا أَسْتَثْنِی فِیهِ أَبَداً وَ لَا أَخَافُ أَنْ یَکْتُبَ اللَّهُ عَلَیَّ فِی یَمِینِی إِثْماً وَ إِنَّ لِهَاتَیْنِ السُّورَتَیْنِ مِنَ اللَّهِ مَکَاناً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “O Aba Muhammad! One who recites Surah Ankaboot and Room on the twenty-third of the month of Ramadan would be included among the people of Paradise. I do not expect anything. Allah would not write any sins of this type. These two Surahs have a high regard near Allah.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from ’Amru b. Jubayr al-’Arzami from his father from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: One who recites Surah Luqman every night, Allah appoints for him angels that protect him from Iblees and his army till the morning. If he recites it in the day, they will not leave him and protect him from Iblees and his army till the night falls.
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ جُبَیْرٍ الْعَرْزَمِیِّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ لُقْمَانَ فِی کُلِّ لَیْلَهٍ وَکَّلَ اللَّهُ بِهِ فِی لَیْلَتِهِ مَلَائِکَهً یَحْفَظُونَهُ مِنْ إِبْلِیسَ وَ جُنُودِهِ حَتَّی یُصْبِحَ فَإِذَا قَرَأَهَا بِالنَّهَارِ لَمْ یَزَالُوا یَحْفَظُونَهُ مِنْ إِبْلِیسَ وَ جُنُودِهِ حَتَّی یُمْسِیَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from ’Amru b. Jubayr al-’Arzami from his father from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: One who recites Surah Luqman every night, Allah appoints for him angels that protect him from Iblees and his army till the morning. If he recites it in the day, they will not leave him and protect him from Iblees and his army till the night falls.
